name: base-orchestrator
description: Local-first multi-wallet Base trade automation dashboard for wallet automation, portfolio testing, and transaction management.

scripts.demo: REDIS_PORT=6380 REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6380 DEMO_MODE=true DRY_RUN=true QUOTE_PROVIDER=mock OPERATOR_PASSWORD=demo-password SESSION_SECRET=demo-session-secret-change-before-live pnpm db:up && REDIS_PORT=6380 REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6380 DEMO_MODE=true DRY_RUN=true QUOTE_PROVIDER=mock OPERATOR_PASSWORD=demo-password SESSION_SECRET=demo-session-secret-change-before-live pnpm db:migrate && REDIS_PORT=6380 REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6380 DEMO_MODE=true DRY_RUN=true QUOTE_PROVIDER=mock OPERATOR_PASSWORD=demo-password SESSION_SECRET=demo-session-secret-change-before-live pnpm demo:seed && REDIS_PORT=6380 REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6380 DEMO_MODE=true DRY_RUN=true QUOTE_PROVIDER=mock OPERATOR_PASSWORD=demo-password SESSION_SECRET=demo-session-secret-change-before-live pnpm dev
scripts.validate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
